feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Why are Serbs like this?

entry.title: /b/ Random: fuck Corsair, it's a crappy company, that's like trying to call a McDonald's ham…
entry.content: fuck Corsair, it's a crappy company, that's like trying to call a McDonald's hamburger, fine dining. Corsair is the McDonald's of PC gaming, which is not a good thing. Because i've had nothing but fucking trouble with Corsair for everything, because: > their power supplies have never worked > their Elgato stuff is trash no wonder Elgato went downhill right into the toilet bowl after when it got merged with Corsair.

entry.title: /int/ International: I need to raise $9,000 for Dental Implants
entry.content: For years, I have struggled with severe dental problems that have deeply affected not only my physical health, but also my confidence, emotional well-being, and daily life. Missing and damaged teeth have caused constant anxiety, embarrassment, social isolation, and difficulty smiling, eating, and speaking comfortably. Dental implants are my opportunity to rebuild my smile, regain self-esteem, and improve my mental health and quality of life. Unfortunately, the full treatment is far beyond what I

entry.title: /b/ Random: Is there any truth to the shit some people say about like non-shielded electroni…
entry.content: Is there any truth to the shit some people say about like non-shielded electronics leading to health problems/stray electricity creating harmful magnetic fields? Always thought this sounded like woo bullshit, and I guess "the science" says it isn't so, but, I'm not sure. How do proponents tell the difference between fatigue from just using a device versus the thing in question literally burning them?

entry.title: /int/ International: >Finland's most famous pine dies >The iconic pine on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli Nat…
entry.content: >Finland's most famous pine dies >The iconic pine on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli National Park has died. >The contorted pine tree, long a landmark for hikers in Koli, has shed its needles and now stands as a dry, weathered trunk. The tree's decline was noticed by an Yle journalist during a hike in the area. >The pine, photographed by thousands of visitors to the park, had become a known natural landmark. >While pines can live for 500–600 years, the exact age of this particular tree is unclear. >The

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Best VTM game and it's not even close. Don't even think about suggesting games w…
entry.content: Best VTM game and it's not even close. Don't even think about suggesting games with dogwater combat like Redemption and Bloodlines 1 are better. It's better to be a focused, linear action game than a bad attempt at an RPG.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Someone on Instagram Threads asked white people when the last time we were perso…
entry.content: Someone on Instagram Threads asked white people when the last time we were personally threatened by a black person was. Lots of people responded with answers ranging from "20 years ago" to "20 minutes ago," and they described their experiences. But, there were also a bunch of people who, for some reason, felt the need to claim that they have only ever been threatened by other white people, or that they have been threatened by more white people than black people, which is not what the OP asked. I

entry.title: /int/ International: >This was because Bejaia was a city of raiders, whose forces would penetrate dee…
entry.content: >This was because Bejaia was a city of raiders, whose forces would penetrate deep into the Roman islands and other territories, driving back a vast number of captives. People would come down to buy them at the Slaughterhouse quarter, near its suburb. >Due to the sheer abundance of human captives, the situation reached a point where two white Romans would be sold in exchange for a single black wild beast (slave) Wypipo's value was once half the value of a black person

entry.title: /b/ Random: IN BRIEF 68 By love, God has revealed himself and given himself to man. He has t…
entry.content: IN BRIEF 68 By love, God has revealed himself and given himself to man. He has thus provided the definitive, superabundant answer to the questions that man asks himself about the meaning and purpose of his life. 69 God has revealed himself to man by gradually communicating his own mystery in deeds and in words. 70 Beyond the witness to himself that God gives in created things, he manifested himself to our first parents, spoke to them and, after the fall, promised them salvation (cf Gen 3:15) and

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Imo the ultra thick carhartt heavyweight hoodies and sweatpants are just as good…
entry.content: Imo the ultra thick carhartt heavyweight hoodies and sweatpants are just as good as the typical dirty unwashable romper suit Riders usually wear. To me wearing thick sweats in the summer feels much cooler and cleaner feeling than sweating into a hot greasy biker suit. I am a skateboarder so i know how protective carhartt hwt sweats are. I havent even put a single hole or scrape on the carhartt sweats i wear skateboarding and i fall alot. I know how to roll with the flow and for that type of fall

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2864
entry.content: >Baphomet Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83517771 >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.org

entry.title: /news/ News: IRAN DEAL FACES BACKLASH FROM CONSERVATIVE ALLIES
entry.content: https://www.foxnews.com/politics/tr ump-renege-iran-deal-faces-backlash -conservative-allies Critics say the framework gives Iran huge financial benefits without requiring dismantlement of nuclear infrastructure President Donald Trump's proposed Iran agreement is drawing sharp criticism from some of his strongest supporters, who argue the deal rewards Tehran before it has agreed to fully dismantle its nuclear program. The 14-point framework agreement, unveiled on Wednesday, establishes an immedi

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >Hey, you know how we design our engines so they obliterate themselves if a flim…
entry.content: >Hey, you know how we design our engines so they obliterate themselves if a flimsy rubber belt snaps? >How about, for a 1% efficiency improvement, we run that rubber belt through oil so the belt snaps even faster? >Lets also not change the service interval so they snap suddenly at 40k long before anyone even thinks about looking at it. Say what you will about belts vs chains, nanny assists, subscriptions, touch screens, whatever. But wet belts are by far the most retarded design choice of the pa

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8384 Super Porn Edition Previous Thread: >>83506861 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profile

I am also fucking sick of shows that do flash backs every since the fucking Arrow show. I honestly just skip the past scenes. I don't give a fuck. Maybe film the past as a season, then the present stuff as a second season. God I just want gozilla to curb stomp everyone

entry.title: /int/ International: Even up until the 1800s, the average height of actual samurai was only around 14…
entry.content: Even up until the 1800s, the average height of actual samurai was only around 140 cm, and there are real photos of samurai taken in the 1900s that prove this. The samurai depicted in movies and games are pure fiction. While Japanese people take pride in their Jomon DNA, the reality is that their genetics are closer to indigenous Filipinos, making them nothing more than sea monkeys

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I just got my motorcycle permit, but I’m not interested in riding a traditional …
entry.content: I just got my motorcycle permit, but I’m not interested in riding a traditional motorcycle. Instead, I’m looking at getting a 125cc–200cc scooter or moped for getting around town. They’re fuel-efficient, and I like the idea of being outside rather than sitting in a hot car in traffic. I live in the city and don’t expect to do any highway riding. I don't mind going down calmer backroads if I need to travel far. With that in mind, which should I go with? I am only 5'2. A dealership near me sells u

entry.title: /mu/ Music: ITT: Dubs decides what albums i listen to
entry.content: Post an album, if you get dubs/trips etc. i will listen to it in its entirety and rate the tracks based on how much i liked them. it can be any album that doesn't exceed 1h 30m. i will not listen to shills or anything posted by the bot if it starts spamming the thread

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Is going to the track the only way to really enjoy a performance car?
entry.content: I have an M340i. It's fast and I love the way it handles and girls like it, but I can't even really step on it without instantly blowing the cucked speed limits in my area. I got pulled over for going 20 over a few weeks ago. Should I have just gotten a plush, slow, Mercedes sort of ride instead? What's the fucking point when you have to share the road with people who should be legally classified as fauna and follow rules meant to keep them from accidentally killing themselves and others?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Public Announcement
entry.content: Telemarketers will be fined by the FCC if your phone is called while registered on the national do not call registry. https://www.donotcall.gov/ >the above site is for US residents >most western nations have similar telephone registries "do not call lists" >the above site and others can also be used to report scam calls

entry.title: /g/ Technology: CHINA SAVES!
entry.content: Last month, we learned that US company Corsair purchased Chinese RAM at $150 (3 times lower than market value) to keep prices low for American consumers. Recently, in June, it's been found that Dell and HP has also began making purchases of cheap Chinese RAM to put into their devices for Americans. Rejoice! China saved tech! China saved gaming!
